city_report.transport: Getting there and away: By bus – The Express Bus is usually the best option, as it is inexpensive (50–90 minutes ride) and runs frequently. However, it can get crowded (and it lacks space for luggage) and can get snarled in traffic. The airport bus stop is straight outside Arrivals on the ground floor.

attraction.name: Romanian Athenaeum
attraction.description: Iconic concert hall and symbol of Romanian culture.

attraction.name: Village Museum
attraction.description: Open-air museum showcasing traditional Romanian life.

attraction.name: Herastrau Park
attraction.description: Large park surrounding a lake in northern Bucharest.

attraction.name: Arcul de Triumf
attraction.description: Triumphal arch dedicated to Romania's WWI victory.

attraction.name: Old Town (Lipscani)
attraction.description: Historical center with vibrant nightlife and architecture.

attraction.name: Stavropoleos Monastery
attraction.description: Small Orthodox monastery known for its Brancovan style.

attraction.name: Revolution Square
attraction.description: The site of major events during the 1989 revolution.

attraction.name: National Art Museum
attraction.description: Art museum located in the former Royal Palace.

attraction.name: Carturesti Carusel
attraction.description: Beautiful bookstore located in a restored 19th-century building.

city_report.description: Metropoli in forte espansione tecnologica, Bucarest offre uno dei migliori rapporti tra costi operativi e qualità delle infrastrutture digitali. Il suo profilo è in rapida evoluzione verso standard di sostenibilità dell'Europa occidentale.
city_report.wiki_intro: Bucharest (Romanian: București) is Romania's capital and largest city. Bucharest has a very interesting mix of old and new: finding a 300-year-old church near a steel-and-glass tower that sits next to a communist-style building is commonplace in Bucharest. Bucharest offers some excellent attractions, and has cultivated a sophisticated, trendy, and modern sensibility that many have come to expect...
